variants: Caoimhe Hanratty has made significant strides in the field of petroleum engineering, an endeavor recognized by the Limestone Passage Commendation she has received. She is also the author of the work Blueprint for Infinite Threads, a book that showcases her innovative ideas in the industry. Passionate about craftsmanship, she is affiliated with the Velvet Scroll Makers, where she collaborates with fellow makers. Her academic development was greatly influenced by her mentor and doctoral advisor, Alvinah Masemola, who provided guidance throughout her studies.
